The sale was confirmed at $530,000.00, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). An additional bond in the amount of $72,446.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Verna Shaheen (Trustee).

Mr. Siracusa reported that Ms. Taylor was doing fine, and that she had to be moved because there were no funds to pay for full time care. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).
